samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divide a 16-bit number by an 8-bit number.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">Dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Divider.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">Remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Register declarations for storing inputs
        reg [15:0] a_reg;
        reg [7:0] b_reg;
        
        // Combinational logic for division
        always @(A or B) begin
            a_reg = A;
            b_reg = B;
            
            // Initialize variables
            integer i;
            reg [15:0] quotient;
            reg [15:0] remainder;
            reg [15:0] temp_remainder;
            reg [15:0] temp_quotient;
            reg [15:0] temp_odd;
            reg [15:0] temp_result;
            // Perform division operation
            for (i = 15; i >= 0; i = i - 1) begin
                temp_remainder = {remainder[14:0], a_reg[i]};
                
                if (temp_remainder >= b_reg) begin
                    temp_remainder = temp_remainder - b_reg;
                    temp_quotient[i] = 1;
                end else begin
                    temp_quotient[i] = 0;
                end
                
                remainder = temp_remainder;
                quotient = temp_quotient;
                temp_odd = remainder;
                temp_result = quotient;
            end
            
            // Assign outputs
            result = temp_result;
            odd = temp_odd;
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
